---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

Tried to recreate the points vs price graph from the html, not getting the same results.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
wine <- read.csv("data/winemag-data-130k-v2.csv")
str(wine)
```
```{r}
ggplot(wine, aes(x=points, y=price)) + geom_point() + geom_abline()
```
